background: The mean survival time in the IDX-treated group was 116 days (SE1 = 5.6). The mean survival time in the control group was 88.5 (SE2 = 1.9). Test H0: μ1 = μ2.

task.query: State the null and alternative hypotheses.
task.answer: H0: μ1 = μ2 versus Ha: μ1 ≠ μ2

The one-sided P-value is between 0.0005 and 0.001 (via Appendix Table C). Therefore, the two-sided P-value is between 0.001 and 0.002. Using www.cytel.com/Products/StaTable/, the two-sided P-value = 0.0012. The evidence against the null hypothesis is highly significant.
The evidence against the null hypothesis is significant at α = 0.01.
